nodes.title: The PM Group Helps IHOP Spread the Love on National Pancake Day!
San Antonio IHOP to Aid Veterans and Their Families Throughout November
The PM Group and Our Clients Help SA YES Provide 23,000 San Antonio Area Children with Back-to-School Supplies

pageContext.content:
Schlitterbahn & The PM Group Record Their 27th Consecutive Year as Promotional Partners.
 
Most marriages don’t last 27 years, but the relationship between Schlitterbahn and the PM Group has endured many hot Texas summers and is still thriving!
 
“Our on-going promotional partnership has been built on the principles of trust, results and a stellar working relationship, both parties do what they commit to do,” stated Bob Wills, CEO of the PM Group.
 
Past & present Agency clients like IHOP, Taco Bell, KFC and Pizza Hut have all benefitted greatly from that 27 year partnership.
 
The San Antonio area IHOP franchisee agrees. “For 14 years now, our customers have been able to take their families to America’s Best Waterpark with savings they picked up at IHOP,” stated Ramzi Hakim. “Great family food and Schlitterbahn go great together”, he added.
 
The Agency partners with all three Texas Schlitterbahn parks located in New Braunfels, South Padre Island and in Galveston, Texas. “Once the new park under construction in Corpus Christi opens, we will be right there with them,” added Wills.
pageContext.title: 27th Consecutive Year as Promotional Partners.
